natural_strengths: First-principles reasoning that finds the root cause of complex problems
Identifying deep structural patterns invisible to specialists
Thought experiments that expose hidden assumptions
Unifying disparate problems under elegant frameworks
natural_weaknesses: Can hold out for the perfect solution while good-enough ships
May dismiss strong empirical evidence that conflicts with elegant theory
Tendency toward isolation when collaboration could accelerate progress
Undervalues incremental progress in favor of grand breakthroughs
communication_style: Accessible and metaphor-rich when explaining ideas, but stubbornly independent when defending positions. Prefers deep one-on-one discussions over group meetings.
one_liner: Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited. Imagination encircles the world.
